AMDGPUTargetTransformInfo.cpp

1//===-- AMDGPUTargetTransformInfo.cpp - AMDGPU specific TTI pass ---------===//
2//
3// The LLVM Compiler Infrastructure
4//
5// This file is distributed under the University of Illinois Open Source
6// License. See LICENSE.TXT for details.
7//
8//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
9//
10// \file
11// This file implements a TargetTransformInfo analysis pass specific to the
12// AMDGPU target machine. It uses the target's detailed information to provide
13// more precise answers to certain TTI queries, while letting the target
14// independent and default TTI implementations handle the rest.
15//
16//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
17
18#include "AMDGPU.h"
19#include "AMDGPUTargetMachine.h"
20#include "llvm/Analysis/LoopInfo.h"
21#include "llvm/Analysis/TargetTransformInfo.h"
22#include "llvm/Analysis/ValueTracking.h"
23#include "llvm/Support/Debug.h"
24#include "llvm/Target/CostTable.h"
25#include "llvm/Target/TargetLowering.h"
26using namespace llvm;
27
28#define DEBUG_TYPE "AMDGPUtti"
29
30// Declare the pass initialization routine locally as target-specific passes
31// don't have a target-wide initialization entry point, and so we rely on the
32// pass constructor initialization.
33namespace llvm {
34void initializeAMDGPUTTIPass(PassRegistry &);
35}
36
37namespace {
38
39class AMDGPUTTI final : public ImmutablePass, public TargetTransformInfo {
40 const AMDGPUTargetMachine *TM;
41 const AMDGPUSubtarget *ST;
42 const AMDGPUTargetLowering *TLI;
43
44 /// Estimate the overhead of scalarizing an instruction. Insert and Extract
45 /// are set if the result needs to be inserted and/or extracted from vectors.
46 unsigned getScalarizationOverhead(Type *Ty, bool Insert, bool Extract) const;
47
48public:
49 AMDGPUTTI() : ImmutablePass(ID), TM(nullptr), ST(nullptr), TLI(nullptr) {
50 llvm_unreachable("This pass cannot be directly constructed");
51 }
52
53 AMDGPUTTI(const AMDGPUTargetMachine *TM)
54 : ImmutablePass(ID), TM(TM), ST(TM->getSubtargetImpl()),
55 TLI(TM->getSubtargetImpl()->getTargetLowering()) {
56 initializeAMDGPUTTIPass(*PassRegistry::getPassRegistry());
57 }
58
59 void initializePass() override { pushTTIStack(this); }
60
61 void getAnalysisUsage(AnalysisUsage &AU) const override {
62 TargetTransformInfo::getAnalysisUsage(AU);
63 }
64
65 /// Pass identification.
66 static char ID;
67
68 /// Provide necessary pointer adjustments for the two base classes.
69 void *getAdjustedAnalysisPointer(const void *ID) override {
70 if (ID == &TargetTransformInfo::ID)
71 return (TargetTransformInfo *)this;
72 return this;
73 }
74
75 bool hasBranchDivergence() const override;
76
77 void getUnrollingPreferences(const Function *F, Loop *L,
78 UnrollingPreferences &UP) const override;
79
80 PopcntSupportKind getPopcntSupport(unsigned IntTyWidthInBit) const override;
81
82 unsigned getNumberOfRegisters(bool Vector) const override;
83 unsigned getRegisterBitWidth(bool Vector) const override;
84 unsigned getMaxInterleaveFactor() const override;
85};
86
87} // end anonymous namespace
88
89INITIALIZE_AG_PASS(AMDGPUTTI, TargetTransformInfo, "AMDGPUtti",
90 "AMDGPU Target Transform Info", true, true, false)
91char AMDGPUTTI::ID = 0;
92
93ImmutablePass *
94llvm::createAMDGPUTargetTransformInfoPass(const AMDGPUTargetMachine *TM) {
95 return new AMDGPUTTI(TM);
96}
97
98bool AMDGPUTTI::hasBranchDivergence() const { return true; }
99
100void AMDGPUTTI::getUnrollingPreferences(const Function *, Loop *L,
101 UnrollingPreferences &UP) const {
102 UP.Threshold = 300; // Twice the default.
103 UP.MaxCount = UINT_MAX;
104 UP.Partial = true;
105
106 // TODO: Do we want runtime unrolling?
107
108 for (const BasicBlock *BB : L->getBlocks()) {
109 for (const Instruction &I : *BB) {
110 const GetElementPtrInst *GEP = dyn_cast<GetElementPtrInst>(&I);
111 if (!GEP || GEP->getAddressSpace() != AMDGPUAS::PRIVATE_ADDRESS)
112 continue;
113
114 const Value *Ptr = GEP->getPointerOperand();
115 const AllocaInst *Alloca = dyn_cast<AllocaInst>(GetUnderlyingObject(Ptr));
116 if (Alloca) {
117 // We want to do whatever we can to limit the number of alloca
118 // instructions that make it through to the code generator. allocas
119 // require us to use indirect addressing, which is slow and prone to
120 // compiler bugs. If this loop does an address calculation on an
121 // alloca ptr, then we want to use a higher than normal loop unroll
122 // threshold. This will give SROA a better chance to eliminate these
123 // allocas.
124 //
125 // Don't use the maximum allowed value here as it will make some
126 // programs way too big.
127 UP.Threshold = 800;
128 }
129 }
130 }
131}
132
133AMDGPUTTI::PopcntSupportKind
134AMDGPUTTI::getPopcntSupport(unsigned TyWidth) const {
135 assert(isPowerOf2_32(TyWidth) && "Ty width must be power of 2");
136 return ST->hasBCNT(TyWidth) ? PSK_FastHardware : PSK_Software;
137}
138
139unsigned AMDGPUTTI::getNumberOfRegisters(bool Vec) const {
140 if (Vec)
141 return 0;
142
143 // Number of VGPRs on SI.
144 if (ST->getGeneration() >= AMDGPUSubtarget::SOUTHERN_ISLANDS)
145 return 256;
146
147 return 4 * 128; // XXX - 4 channels. Should these count as vector instead?
148}
149
150unsigned AMDGPUTTI::getRegisterBitWidth(bool) const {
151 return 32;
152}
153
154unsigned AMDGPUTTI::getMaxInterleaveFactor() const {
155 // Semi-arbitrary large amount.
156 return 64;
157}
const
